question:
Consider the following oil fields of India :
I. Digboi
II. Moran
III. Kalol
IV. Naharkatiya
Which of the above oil fields are located in Assam ?
In India, most of the jute mills are located in :

Consider the following erstwhile districts of Andhra Pradesh :
I. West Godavari
II. East Godavari
III. Visakhapatnam
IV. Srikakulam
